claim: Explorer evidence is verified: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements JSON repair for minor Claude key drift and fails closed with EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON on unrecoverable JSON.

evidence.summary: Four Claude JSON drift repair patterns verified: line ranges, lone backslashes, duplicate key quotes, and trailing commas.
evidence.why: Confirms the implementation matches the demand requirements for recoverable drift.

evidence.summary: errorCode is set to EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON when !parsed, with status=failed, completed=false, recommendation=block.
evidence.why: Verifies the fail-closed behavior produces explicit blockers as required.

evidence.summary: json_repaired field records whether parseJsonCandidate applied repairs via parsedOutput.repaired.
evidence.why: Confirms that recoverable drift is recorded as required.

evidence.summary: Test repairs minor Claude JSON key drift and records the repair; line 729 asserts json_repaired === true.
evidence.why: Test demonstrates expected behavior for recoverable drift with real Claude output patterns.

evidence.summary: Test verifies invalid JSON fails closed with status=blocked and error_code=EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON on line 760.
evidence.why: Test confirms fail-closed behavior produces explicit blockers for unrecoverable JSON.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA constants define the evidence result schema contract used across dispatch.
evidence.why: Verifies the schema contract that evidence results must satisfy.

result.notes: All explorer evidence verified directly from source code and tests. Line numbers are accurate, all four repair patterns are implemented, fail-closed behavior with EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON is confirmed, and tests demonstrate both recoverable drift recording and unrecoverable JSON blocking. No assumptions promoted to facts. All evidence paths are usable and verified.
